articleTitle: Hill Billy Rail Road Texas Bronco
introSection: Hill Billy Rail Road Texas Bronco (Japanese: テキサスブロンコ) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Tojoko Toy Kingdom in Tojo, Hyōgo, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are designed to resemble mine carts.

fullText:
Hill Billy Rail Road Texas Bronco (Japanese: テキサスブロンコ) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Tojoko Toy Kingdom in Tojo, Hyōgo, Japan.



Brown track and supports.

The trains are designed to resemble mine carts.
